output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(ROUND(?duration) AS ?minutes) WHERE {
  VALUES ?series {
    wd:Q584347
  }
  ?game wdt:P1035 ?series .
  ?game wdt:P1633 wd:Q26191 .
  ?game wdt:P512 ?quantity .
  ?quantity wikibase:quantityAmount ?duration .
  ?quantity wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q11503 .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 1
